label_notes: Source: training knowledge. X (formerly Twitter) collects extensive behavioral data focused on content delivery and advertising. Platform encourages public content sharing, making content moderation and data use particularly impactful. Heavy reliance on profiling and algorithmic personalization. Ownership change to Elon Musk in 2022 led to policy changes and reduced public transparency. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
